description_long: This is a large, gray military cargo airplane with a high-wing configuration and four turbofan engines mounted under the wings. The fuselage is robust and cylindrical, with a slightly tapered nose and a pronounced cockpit area at the front. The wings are straight with a slight dihedral angle and lack winglets, while the tail features a T-tail design with a horizontal stabilizer mounted atop a tall vertical fin. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with multiple wheels visible under the fuselage and wings. The surface is matte gray with visible panel lines and markings, including 'U.S. Air Force' insignia. The airplane is designed for heavy transport, with a large cargo hold accessible from the rear.
description: Large gray military cargo airplane with four underwing turbofan engines, high straight wings, and a T-tail. Features a robust fuselage and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide wingspan, four turbofan engines, and prominent cockpit at the nose.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the fuselage, engine placement, and T-tail configuration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the T-tail, straight wings, and the broad cargo fuselage.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing engine arrangement and military markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing configuration with straight wings and a slight dihedral angle, no winglets present.
attribute_engine_type: Four turbofan engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and a high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with multiple main and nose gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
